summary: 77 analysts: median PT $300, mean PT ~$299-$309 range across sources. Low $200 (bear), High $350 (Wedbush/Dan Ives). Consensus 'Moderate Buy' to 'Buy'. 17 buy, 9 hold, 1 sell in some samples. Wedbush most bullish at $350.
